'''Altarrn''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Altarrn system/Legends|Altarrn system]] within the [[Glythe sector/Legends|Glythe sector]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the rare [[spidery nightglider]]s.

==History==
Discovered sometime between [[3000 BBY]] and [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]], the planet was located in [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] space, and later the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Following the fall of the Empire, the planet was engulfed in [[Thrawn campaign|the campaign]] against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] launched by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]]. After Thrawn's defeat, the planet fell to the Republic and later the [[Imperial Remnant]]. As of [[137 ABY]], the world was controlled by [[Darth Krayt]]'s [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Empire]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}
